texto: Fin," she whispered. "What do you need?" He covered her hand, right there in her lap, then let go quickly and dipped his head to try to meet her downcast eyes. He smelled so good--like intrigue and dubious morality. It sent a delicious shiver down her arms.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Lauren Christopher: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “Fin," she whispered. "What do you need?" He covered her hand, right there in her lap, then let go…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, sexy, whispered pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.

frase_original: Fin," she whispered. "What do you need?" He covered her hand, right there in her lap, then let go quickly and dipped his head to try to meet her downcast eyes. He smelled so good--like intrigue and dubious morality. It sent a delicious shiver down her arms.
